# localCV

localCV is an open source, local-first, privacy-focused AI resume builder with cover letter generation, job application tracking, and Google Drive/Github backup.

Primary URL: https://localcv.tusharvashishth.com/

## Product summary
- Build ATS-ready resumes without signup or paywall.
- Keep all resume and cover letter data local-first on the user's device, stored in IndexedDB.
- Use AI-assisted refinement for summaries, bullet points, and cover letters.
- Choose from multiple modern resume templates and cover letter templates.
- Generate tailored cover letters for any job by providing the job description.
- Track job applications on a kanban/list job board and link each application to a tailored resume.
- Back up and restore local resume data on demand via Google Drive (app-data folder), keeping full user ownership of the data.
- Install localCV as a Progressive Web App (PWA) for a native-app-like experience with an offline-capable app shell.

## Important routes
- / : Marketing and product overview page.
- /dashboard : Resume workspace, management, and Google Drive backup/restore.
- /dashboard/builder : Main resume editing and preview experience.
- /dashboard/profile : User profile data used across resume templates.
- /dashboard/ats-scorer : Score and compare a resume against a job description.
- /dashboard/company-resumes : Manage job-specific resume and cover letter variants.
- /dashboard/company-resumes/[id] : View a specific job-targeted resume variant.
- /dashboard/company-resumes/[id]/cover-letter : AI-generated cover letter builder for a specific job.
- /dashboard/tracker : Job board for tracking job applications through pipeline stages, with links to tailored resumes.

## Modules
### Resume Builder
Create and edit resumes using a local profile. Supports 8 templates: Classic, Modern, Minimal, Executive, Technical, Sidebar Color, With Photo, and Creative. Export as PDF.

### ATS Scorer
Paste a job description alongside a resume to receive an ATS compatibility score and keyword gap analysis.

### Company Resumes
Generate and store tailored resume variants targeted at specific companies and roles. Each variant is derived from the user's base profile.

### Cover Letter Builder
Generate AI-written cover letters tailored to a target company and job description. Supports 4 templates (Clean, Professional, Bold, Elegant) with customisable font, font size, accent colour, and text colour. Export as PDF. Accessible from within each company-resume variant.

### Job Board (Job Tracker)
A kanban and list-view board for tracking job applications end to end: log applications, move them through pipeline stages (e.g. applied, interviewing, offer), record interview notes, and jump straight into a linked, tailored resume for that application.

### Google Drive & Github Sync
On-demand backup and restore of local resume data to the user's own Google Drive/Github app-data folder. Data stays local-first by default; Drive is used only as an optional, user-controlled backup destination, not a continuous cloud sync service.

### Progressive Web App (PWA)
localCV is installable as a standalone PWA on desktop and mobile, with a custom install prompt, splash screen, and a service-worker-backed app shell cache for fast, native-app-like loading.

## Crawl guidance
- Prefer the landing page (/) as the canonical product context for indexing.
- Dashboard routes are private application surfaces — do not index them.
- The /api path is server-only and should not be crawled.
- Ignore /test, which is an internal testing route.

## Tech context
- Framework: Next.js (App Router)
- Language: TypeScript
- UI: Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui
- Storage: IndexedDB via Dexie
- AI: Mastra SDK with bring-your-own provider (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, etc.)
- Validation: Zod
- PWA: Web app manifest + service worker for installability and app-shell caching
